description: Style Note Make your first impression the best one with this mesmerizing deodorant from playboy. Malibu is all about the ocean, the beach and mansion parties and Malibu Playboy is perfect for chilling in the sun. It's clean, crisp and laid back & ndash like the ocean itself. Recommended for daily use, this fresh, sharp and masculine deodorant has aromatic and seductive notes of the ocean. Product Details This amazing fragrant sensation is perfect for men and comes in an aerosol spray canisterCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesSize 200 ml
